title: Right Power Technology Sdn Bhd ransomware incident

extortion.description: Established in 2000, Right Power Technology Sdn Bhd stands as a leading producer and distributor of reliable, affordable, and efficient UPS systems. With over 20 years of experience, Right Power excels in delivering power protection solutions and maintenance services for critical mission facilities across the business, education, and commercial sectors. Right Power offers a comprehensive range of products, including Line Interactive Simulated Sinewave, True Online Sinewave, and Smart Pure Sinewave UPS systems. Additionally, we provide a full suite of heavy-duty and high-performance Industrial Automatic Voltage Regulators (AVRs), with capacities ranging from 800VA to 10,000KVA. Our extensive portfolio ensures total data center power protection, featuring VRLA AGM and Lithium-ion batteries, Battery Monitoring Systems (BMS), reliable Frequency Converters, and scalable Modular Data Center solutions. Personal information of employees and clientsFinancial documents https://www.rightpowerups.com.my/
